data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures data security by implementing encryption protocols for data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an additional security layer by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Integration with SMS, email, and authenticator apps for 2FA.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects services against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain availability.
data.technical_spec: Employs AWS Shield Advanced for DDoS mitigation.

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Regularly scans the software ecosystem for vulnerabilities to preemptively address security risks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Nessus for automated security assessments.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Monitors and analyzes security events from across the network to identify threats.
data.technical_spec: Implemented through Splunk for real-time insights.
